Off Calendar Jun-05-2024 Continued To Jul-17-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Bruce Feder appeared by zoom for and with Faye Chin (personal representative) by zoom.

The court noted that there is a post deceased devisee and questions how this fits together if it grants final distribution, as there will nothing left for review. Mr. Feder stated that he has been advised to file certified death certificates and to get small estate affidavits from various people, and requested a continuance to do so. Discussion was held regarding the possibility of doing preliminary distribution. The Second Amended First and Final Account and Report of Executors, etc. is continued to July 17, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: W. James. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-08-2019 Continued To Nov-12-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Trisha Friedeberg for and with Faye Chin and Bo King Lau (proposed Executors)

The Court sets forth petitioners' request to get into the safe deposit box and does not have special letters yet. Ms. Friedeberg states they are not sure if the will is in the safe deposit box. The Court orally grants issuance of special letters for the sole purpose of gaining access to safe deposit box. Order signed after hearing.

The petition for probate of will and for letters testamentary is continued to November 12, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
